'''Bingo Mehndra''' was a [[Balti]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] and rival of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]]. He operated out of a base on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]].

==Biography==
On one occasion, Jabba took advantage of Mehndra's love of [[Jizz/Legends|jizz]] music to concoct an elaborate [[Assassin/Legends|assassination]] plot. The Hutt sent his retainers, the [[Max Rebo Band/Legends|Max Rebo Band]], to Hoth to perform at Mehndra's [[Spawning Day]] party. Unbeknownst to Mehndra, the band's sound equipment was rigged to explode at the end of the concert. The explosion destroyed Mehndra's base, presumably killing him and most of his gang. The Max Rebo Band would have died as well, had they not substituted a [[Hologram/Legends|hologram]] of a concert on [[Orto/Legends|Orto]] for a live performance after [[Droopy McCool/Legends|Droopy McCool]] discovered the [[Thermite/Legends|thermite]] explosives in their speakers.<ref name="SWI 67">{{InsiderCite|67|Who's Who in the Max Rebo Band}}</ref>
